evidence_boundary: Planning and research output only. Repository facts and generated representations are P0-P2 as declared by repoctl; no P3 implementation or P4 external acceptance is claimed.
goal: Create a 64-dimensional generated-bespoke-software map for AMTECH: AI employees and swarms generate custom-feeling operating software for every computer-based job in non-technical businesses, without owners needing API keys or technical setup.
objective: Determine the most recent active plan, assess overall software state, evaluate why the current UI underrepresents generated bespoke AI-employee software, and produce the 64D map, generated full-stack multi-vertical matrix, best three first next steps, downstream maps, and typed hypervector/interconnection view.
success_criteria: Use active repository authority and repoctl-generated artifacts rather than stale plans.
Use task-conditioned repoctl queries for authority, effects, invariants, and evidence.
Include focused online research for current cutting-edge AI agent/work UI patterns.
Identify the best three first next steps and three next steps under each.
Internalize the generated-bespoke-software thesis as the primary product/UI constraint.
Map connections to existing active plans, software topology, proof classes, and open gates.
Do not modify product source or create implementation claims.
